violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open packages of food in both upright freezers.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed broken seal on South upright freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave in food prep area.
